summary: Added a read-only doctor/--doctor envelope to blocker-auto-close.sh so the blocker auto-close hook exposes prerequisites without evaluating acceptance conditions or mutating blocker/escalation state.

proof.summary: 22/0 including doctor read-only envelope, --doctor alias, dry-run/apply/idempotency/failure/scan/live-probe fixtures.
doctor_subcommand_status moved to basic; canonical_cli_scoping_status remains partial; mutates_state=yes; ownership=own.

boundaries: Doctor mode does not evaluate acceptance_condition commands.
Doctor mode writes no blocker JSON and no escalation JSONL rows.
Mutation remains gated by existing --apply behavior.
Canonical CLI scoping remains separately classified as partial; this closeout is limited to doctor-mode gap reduction.
